name: Democrats.org
subject: We're fighting for every American - are you with us?
body:

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c39d/4067b0a/223931c9a/7e07eaf0/2300232794/VEsHAg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161204_dnc_nd&source=em_20161204_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c39d/4067b0a/223931c9a/7e07eaf1/2300232794/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161204_dnc_nd&source=em_20161204_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c39d/4067b0a/223931c9a/7e07eafe/2300232794/VEsHDA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161204_dnc_nd&source=em_20161204_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c39d/4067b0a/223931c9a/7e07eaff/2300232794/VEsEBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161204_dnc_nd&source=em_20161204_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.
